title: Restream
subtitle: Forward this live stream to several RTMP destinations at once (YouTube, Twitch, Facebook or your own server). Each destination runs its own egress: if one fails, the others keep going.

form.name: Name
form.nameHint: Optional label to identify the destination.
form.keyHint: Paste the stream key the platform gives you. It is stored server-side and never shown in full again.
form.urlHint: Full rtmp:// or rtmps:// URL (including the stream key if applicable).

formError.keyInvalid: The stream key cannot contain spaces or slashes.
formError.urlInvalid: The URL must start with rtmp:// or rtmps://.

list.title: Destinations
list.empty: No destinations yet. Add the first one above.
